svg.aria-label: Token Activity. Building height represents daily tokens. This 30-day window has 26 token-active days. Its token rhythm is consistent rhythm. The current token streak is 9 days.

g.title: Building height represents daily tokens. HEIGHT = DAILY TOKENS · 26/30 ACTIVE · GREEN PATH = 9D STREAK
